work_package_result.summary: Connected the accepted Tauri desktop shell to an independently owned dennett-node over authenticated Windows Named Pipes, with current-user ACLs and bilateral identity checks, a bounded one-use bootstrap proof, authoritative bootstrap/watch state, ordered deltas, cancellation-aware reconnect and UI-safe renderer DTOs.

passed: 17 local IPC tests cover semantic current-user DACLs, bilateral peer identity, one handshake per connection, replay and proof binding, bounded session and challenge state, raw-client pre-authentication expiry, accept-loop recovery, message limits, authenticated bootstrap and ordered watch frames
7 Head system tests cover snapshot-first watches, lagged-stream resync, concurrent revision publication order and collision-safe stream identities
3 real-process Node lifecycle tests include abrupt launcher abort followed by two authenticated reconnects to the surviving detached Node
10 Tauri bridge tests cover safe DTO conversion, exact-one initial snapshot delivery, Node-independent window close and cancellation of the complete reconnect future
23 desktop renderer tests preserve the owner-approved screen and enforce the transport-neutral DennettClient boundary without exposing installation or proof secrets
mise exec -- just check passed repository, documentation, planning, Rust, Python, TypeScript and protocol gates at c0a43356c294aabc23bec108aecdaf1e7bd3580b
final executable head 41a7f8e60ca94cee81b1ba123ced59bd45cd9377 passed targeted Head tests and strict clippy after collision-safe stream identity was added
GitHub Fast Gate run 80 and Windows Desktop IPC run 6 both passed on final reviewed executable head 41a7f8e60ca94cee81b1ba123ced59bd45cd9377
not_run: Unix Domain Socket implementation and certification remain a later transport-adapter package
long-duration load, fuzzing, cross-process same-user flooding, machine suspend and forced resource-exhaustion campaigns remain release-wide adversarial hardening
the complete visible conversation, Codex turn, Stop, timeout, draft restoration and forced gap recovery belong to WP-M01-007

review.method: Two detached read-only R2 reviews of exact executable commit 5d88c7916313ef1771eac99560f70960aec6d7be returned PASS with no P0-P2 findings. One reviewer reported a P3 millisecond stream-identity collision; it was replaced by UUIDv7 and both reviewers rechecked exact clean commit 41a7f8e60ca94cee81b1ba123ced59bd45cd9377 and returned PASS.
findings_closed: Serialized committed SystemProjection delta publication with the revision write lock so concurrent commits cannot broadcast out of order
Removed the duplicate initial-snapshot delivery race by returning the watch snapshot once through the command response before channel deltas
Added bounded connect, handshake, bootstrap, watch-open and initial-snapshot deadlines and made window close cancel the entire reconnect path
Limited pre-authenticated Named Pipe clients per process, expired idle raw connections and kept ERROR_PIPE_BUSY from terminating the accept loop
Bound one handshake attempt to each accepted connection and bounded or purged session and challenge registry state
Replaced millisecond stream identities with UUIDv7 and added a rapid-subscription collision regression test
Replaced lifecycle simulation with a real launcher abort and verified the detached Node remains reachable by successive authenticated clients

observability_changes: desktop startup and recovery expose discovery, Node start, handshake, subscribe, watching and reconnect phases without logging endpoint, installation, challenge or proof material
deadline, protocol, authority-epoch, watch-gap and Node-start failures retain distinct UI-safe codes and retry guidance
known_limitations: the real local IPC transport is Windows Named Pipe only in this package; other operating systems fail closed as unsupported
authenticated same-user sessions have a bounded twelve-hour lifetime and long-lived watch reads intentionally have no idle deadline; reconnect and shutdown remain cancellable
the accepted desktop screen is unchanged and does not submit a real chat turn until WP-M01-007
follow_up_candidates: release-wide IPC fuzzing, sustained-load and resource-exhaustion qualification
